name: ISM Manufacturing PMI
notes: ISM headline Manufacturing PMI composite. DB.nomics mirror may lag 4-8 months. Replaces FMP calendar (paywalled 2025-08).

name: ISM Manufacturing New Orders
notes: ISM Manufacturing New Orders sub-index. Most forward-looking PMI component. Replaces FMP calendar.

name: ISM Services PMI (Non-Manufacturing)
notes: ISM Non-Manufacturing headline PMI. Services ~70% of US GDP. Replaces FMP calendar.

name: Eurozone Employment
notes: Total employment domestic concept. Cycle-coincident labour market indicator.

name: BoJ Policy Rate
notes: T1 fallback for FRED IRSTCB01JPM156N (frozen 2008-12). IMF IFS Bank of Japan policy rate. Wired §3.1 Stage B 2026-04-30.

name: PBoC Policy Rate
notes: T1 fallback for FRED IRSTCB01CNM156N (frozen 2015-11). IMF IFS PBoC policy rate. Wired §3.1 Stage B 2026-04-30. [2026-07-08 A15 note: with Section C now reading real observation dates from the Last Observation metadata row, this wide override is no longer needed to suppress held-rate staleness noise - it is retained because it doubles as the A14 bounded-fill limit (2x override) for this row.]

name: Japan Core CPI YoY (ex food & energy)
notes: OECD COICOP2018 national CPI ex-food-and-energy growth rate over 1 year (international core CPI convention; BoJ also publishes ex-fresh-food and ex-fresh-food-and-energy variants). Back to 1956-01 (844 obs verified live 2026-06-10 — 2026-04 = 1.1%). Replaces frozen FRED CPGRLE01JPM659N / OECD MEI mirror (stale at 2021-06). Wired §3.1.3 follow-up: blended into JP_INFL1 alongside JPN_CPI_YOY headline.

name: Japan CPI (All Items, Index)
notes: OECD COICOP2018 national all-items CPI index level (UNIT_MEASURE=IX, same DSD family as JPN_CPI_YOY). Reinstated 2026-07-08 after the dead FRED mirror JPNCPIALLMINMEI (frozen 2021-06) was dropped the same day - operator asked for the Japan CPI index to be kept alive from a proper source. Verified live 2026-07-08 (history 1955-01+, 115.0 @ 2026-04; base year confirmed 2015=100.0 on the annual sibling). NOW T1 FALLBACK (2026-07-09): the e-Stat tier-0 primary was wired per forward_plan §2.A A13 — macro_library_estat.csv statsDataId 0003427113 (Statistics Bureau 2020-base CPI), slice cdTab=1/cdCat01=0001/cdArea=00000 pinned via getMetaInfo, verified live 733 obs 1970-01 -> 2026-05 = 113.5. This OECD row (tier 1) serves as the automatic fallback via the cadence/tier merge.

name: Japan CPI Headline YoY (All Items)
notes: OECD COICOP2018 national all-items CPI growth rate over 1 year (all-items expenditure _T, same DSD family as the JPN_CORE_CPI_YOY ex-food-energy cut). Fresh monthly headline replacing the discontinued FRED JPNCPIALLMINMEI index (dead since 2022-04, which had frozen JP_INFL1 at a flat 8.49). Verified live 2026-07-07 (664 obs 1971-01 -> 2026-04 = 1.4%). Feeds JP_INFL1 headline; wins over the WB annual CPI_YOY fallback by cadence.

name: Canada CPI Headline YoY (All Items)
notes: OECD COICOP2018 national all-items CPI YoY. Fresh monthly headline (wins over WB annual fallback by cadence); CAN_CPI_INDEX (StatCan) carries the index level. Verified live 2026-07-07 (2026-04 = 2.82%).

name: Switzerland CPI Headline YoY (All Items)
notes: OECD COICOP2018 national all-items CPI YoY. Fresh monthly headline (wins over WB annual fallback by cadence). Verified live 2026-07-07 (2026-05 = 0.62%).

name: France CPI Headline YoY (All Items)
notes: OECD COICOP2018 national all-items CPI YoY (national CPI, not HICP). Fresh monthly headline (wins over WB annual fallback by cadence). Verified live 2026-07-07 (2026-04 = 2.16%).

name: Italy CPI Headline YoY (All Items)
notes: OECD COICOP2018 national all-items CPI YoY. Fresh monthly headline (wins over WB annual fallback by cadence). Verified live 2026-07-07 (2026-04 = 2.7%).

name: Netherlands CPI Headline YoY (All Items)
notes: OECD COICOP2018 national all-items CPI YoY. Fresh monthly headline (wins over WB annual fallback by cadence). Verified live 2026-07-07 (2026-05 = 3.50%).

name: Germany HICP Headline YoY (All Items)
notes: OECD COICOP2018 all-items YoY — OECD's db.nomics mirror exposes only the HICP (harmonised) methodology for DEU, not the national VPI; labelled HICP accordingly. Fresh monthly (wins over WB annual fallback by cadence). Verified live 2026-07-07 (2026-05 = 2.7%).

name: ISM Manufacturing Inventories
notes: ISM Manufacturing Inventories sub-index (Index series). Enables the New Orders minus Inventories leading spread. DB.nomics mirror; verified live 2026-06-15.

name: ISM Manufacturing Prices Paid
notes: ISM Manufacturing Prices Paid sub-index (Index series). Leads producer/consumer prices. DB.nomics mirror; verified live 2026-06-15.

name: China M2 Money Supply (YoY)
notes: DB.nomics NBS/M_A0D01/A0D0102 — National Bureau of Statistics of China: Money & Quasi-Money (M2) Supply, Growth Rate. Despite the NBS column title 'same period last year=100', values are served as YoY percent (e.g. 9.0 @ 2026-02, 8.5 @ 2025-12). Replaces frozen FRED OECD-MEI mirror MYAGM2CNM189N (a stock LEVEL mislabelled "Percent Change YoY", froze 2019-08) and resolves the long-standing China M2 accepted-gap — see forward_plan §2.B / chronology (PR #221). NBS mirror lags ~4 months (override 120). Verified live 2026-06-17 (9.0% @ 2026-02).
